channel.title: 最新限免 / 促销应用
channel.description: GoFans：最新限免 / 促销应用 - Made with love by RSSHub(https://github.com/DIYgod/RSSHub)

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Visual Attributed String
item.description:
原价：¥40.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：macOS
Create NSAttributedStrings for your iOS and Mac applications by simply writing text and applying effects to words and paragraphs in the document like you would in any word processing application! Visual Attributed String is the most advanced WYSIWYG (what you see is what you get) editor for attribut

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Dedalus - Delay Audio Mangler
item.description:
原价：¥60.00 -> 现价：¥58.00
平台：iOS
Dedalus Delay is a real time audio mangler. A network of delay lines is continually granulated and modulated, producing a labyrinth of echoes, which are further processed by filters, dynamic processors and saturation modules. Dedalus can produce a wide variety of effects, from reverb-like ambiences

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Reverb - FDN
item.description:
原价：¥60.00 -> 现价：¥58.00
平台：iOS
The Amazing Noises Reverb is a Feedback Delay Network (FDN) Reverb Effect, which can create nice reverberated ambiences, from small rooms to huge buildings. It can also simulate alien and unreal spaces, for your experimental fun! Main Features: + AudioUnit V3, Audiobus and Inter-App Audio support

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」synthQ
item.description:
原价：¥40.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：iOS
Introducing the queuing synthesizer for iPad. SynthQ has been designed from the ground up with the touchscreen interface in mind. SynthQ is a subtractive synthesizer with a customizable interface. A unique module queuing system, resizable multi-octave keyboard, and intuitive cable-based modulation

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Tuner for YouTube music
item.description:
原价：¥40.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：macOS
Want an unlimited music library? that's why we developed Tuner, the YouTube music player for your Mac. Tuner lets you stream music on YouTube, with a friendly UI. Main features: - Stream music directly from YouTube. - Picture in picture, keep watching videos while using other apps. - Use media key

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Favorite Text
item.description:
原价：¥60.00 -> 现价：¥58.00
平台：macOS
Favorite Text - Snippet, Clipboard, Password, Secret Note Manager. Insert a Snippet into another application in one click. Insert Login and Password in the registration form in one click. Create a new Note and write down important thoughts and ideas. Turn on "Tracking clipboard" and you can alway

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」互动教程 for Photoshop脚本 珍藏版
item.description:
原价：¥40.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：iOS
学会Photoshop脚本，可以大幅度提高您的工作效率，具体来说您可以： * 一键给n个图片批量添加水印。 * 一键给n个图层批量统一命名风格。 * 一键给n个图片批量自动对比度、自动色阶等美化处理。 * 一键将n个图片批量生成网站上使用的限定尺寸的缩略图。 * 一键将n个图片按顺序上下合并，并输出为pdf方便传播。 * 一键将n个图片进行JPEG压缩或转换为GIF格式。 * 一键生成各种艺术字、透视效果的阴影、变幻莫测的背景图案以及其他特效，制作并收藏属于自己的特效脚本库。 * 一键将n个png图

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Sound Booster
item.description:
原价：¥40.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：macOS
Sound Booster is a simple yet powerful app for an enhanced audio experience on your Mac. Through boosting the volume of music files, you can enjoy your music with a boost on your Mac, iPhone, or iPad. Additionally, with an optional component, you are able to boost the volume of all apps on your M

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」解剖和生理学
item.description:
原价：¥233.00 -> 现价：¥228.00
平台：iOS
征服那些难学的解剖主题！ 抛开课本、实验室标本或塑料三维模型，跳转到身临其境式三维体验。 - 放大后即可用真正的3D模式查看神经如何离开脊髓以及神经与椎骨的关系。  - 旋转即可研究颅神经的分支或从各个角度研究对眼睛的显微解剖。 - 观看一段50秒钟的三维动画，其中解释说明肌肉收缩的生理机能。 - 自定义该应用程序并跟踪您的学习进度。 创建一个包含三维模型、插图、动画和您需要查看的笔记的收藏夹库。 访问一项对您的测验成绩进行的逐题评估来跟踪您对概念的理解。 此应用程序包括12个单元，有50个章节/模块，它们使用超过500幅3D模型预设视图、超过150幅插图和动画、数十个组织学幻灯片以及数以百

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Collabora Office
item.description:
原价：¥60.00 -> 现价：¥58.00
平台：macOS
Collabora Office is an enterprise version of LibreOffice, the world’s most popular open-source office productivity suite. Key features: • Enterprise-hardened through relentless independent testing • Backported key features from newer versions of LibreOffice • Improved OOXML file support (.docx, .d

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Procreate Pocket
item.description:
原价：¥40.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：iOS
功能强大，可以满足专业创作人员的需求。简单易用。屡获殊荣的 Procreate Pocket 中包含了专门为 iPhone 设计的各种通用艺术应用程序，集合了各种功能。 Procreate Pocket 提供了数百种手动画笔、一套创意艺术工具、一套高级图层系统和全新的 Valkyrie 绘图引擎，可以助您创作出迷人的素描、漂亮的图画、精美的插图和美妙的动画。无论躺在沙发上，还是乘坐火车，在海边休闲，还是排队买咖啡，都可以轻松创作。Procreate Pocket 就是您手中的移动画室。Procreate Pocket 包括： • 高亮区域：  - 可创建高达 16k x 4k 像素的超高清

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Textkraft Pocket
item.description:
原价：¥40.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：iOS
Read, write, research, correct and share! Textkraft Pocket for iPhone is a professional writing app and document reader with many specialities. The magic about Textkraft is, that you have all documents for your project in one app, side by side, without additional downloading times accessible. Swipe

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」apeFilter
item.description:
原价：¥40.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：iOS
apeFilter is a sophisticated Equaliser, the DSP is based on the Biquad/Cascade filters, very fast! The graphical interaction provides a great tool to design an extremely precise and smooth frequency response by directly manipulating up to 36 Peaks Filters. The Spectral Grid compilers increase the co

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」PNG Animator
item.description:
原价：¥40.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：macOS
轻松生成 APNG 文件（动画便携式网络图形）。 APNG 类似于动画 GIF，但支持 24 位图像和 8 位透明度（不适用于 GIF）。 特征： - 加载您的图像文件序列（拖放文件和文件夹）； - 加载视频并直接捕获帧； - 改变拖动框架的框架顺序； - 设置每帧之间的延迟； - 设置循环的计数器（0 = 永远）； - 更改所选帧的持续时间； - 在选定的维度上调整所有框架的大小 - 设置默认持续时间（加载时）； - 更改预览的背景颜色； - 检查总持续时间； - 预览您的动画； - 选择压缩类型（无、zlib、7zip、zopfli）； - 导出文件（扩展名为 .png）并在支持 AP

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」WBS - Project Work Breakdown
item.description:
原价：¥60.00 -> 现价：¥58.00
平台：iOS
Manage the work breakdown structure (WBS) in the list and tree diagram. Construct the work package tree and update the estimate; import work items from MS Excel and export the work breakdown structure to PDF, Excel, and image files. Also, we can convert a work breakdown structure to a project plan f

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Ai Auto Save - for Adobe Illustrator
item.description:
原价：¥40.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：macOS
If you've ever been frustrated by the lack of an Auto Save feature in Adobe Illustrator* then Ai Auto Save is for you. It's a status bar app which will automatically save your Illustrator documents, minimising lost work should Illustrator quit unexpectedly. • You can set the frequency of automatic

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」GoCoEdit - Code & Text Editor
item.description:
原价：¥60.00 -> 现价：¥58.00
平台：iOS
GoCodeEditor is a Code Editor optimized for fast opening and editing local and remote files (Dropbox, OneDrive, Google Drive, FTP, SFTP/SSH) on your iOS Device. FEATURES: ------------------------------ • Sublime like Code-Editor! • Universal App (use it on your iPad, iPhone & iPod Touch) • iPho

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Remote Wake Up
item.description:
原价：¥40.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：macOS
Remote Wake Up is a tool that allows you to remotely switch on every Wake On Lan capable device. You can also wake up devices over the internet. Additionally Remote Wake Up allows you to reboot, shut down, send other Macs to sleep or even send AppleScripts using SSH. Features • Wake up every Wake O

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」Smart Resume Pro
item.description:
原价：¥40.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：iOS
Build and submit a professionally typeset resume in minutes. Simply fill in your information, and Smart Resume Pro produces a clean, properly formatted PDF resume you can email directly, post online, or print out. Now you have NO EXCUSE not to get your resume done! BUILD A PROFESSIONAL RESUME IN M

item.title: 「降价」-「iOS」小牛计算器(高级版)
item.description:
原价：¥40.00 -> 现价：¥38.00
平台：iOS
小牛计算器是一款基于表达式的编程式计算器。用户可以定义常用的函数来简化日常计算。 先来看看一些简单的数学题： 问题一： 小明（为什么又是小明？）一天可以挣500 块，请问他年收入是多少？（假设他每周工作 5 天，一年工作 48 周） 答： 这个很简单啦，在小牛计算器里输入这样的算式就可以： 500 x 5 x 48 问题二： 计算这样的算式，一般的计算器需要按多少次按钮？ 答： 一般 8 次，小牛计算器是 7 次，因为不需要按 ‘=’ 号 问题三： 如果小明的日薪是 600， 700， 800...年收入又怎么算？ 答： 600 x 5 x 48; 700 x 5 x 48;
